name: io.github.alxvasilevvv/nectarin-intelligence-worker
title: NECTARIN Intelligence
description: RU/CIS AI marketing intelligence agent — 25 MCP tools incl. one-call strategy orchestration, a conversion-maximizing budget optimizer, RU ad-law compliance review (ФЗ-38/ОРД), A/B test power analysis, unit-economics (LTV/CAC), full-funnel modeling, seasonality forecasting, creative scoring, multi-touch attribution and bid simulation: media planning, RU benchmarks, audience insights, competitor & GEO/AEO scans, ROI/value forecasting, creative briefs and lead/funnel helpers. Orchestrator-worker server on Cloudflare Workers.
